items.prompt: Explain a banana to a 5th-grade student in one short paragraph.
items.candidate_explanation: A banana is a sweet edible fruit that grows on a large plant called Musa. It has a peel you remove before you eat it. When it is ripe, it usually looks yellow. Bananas are known for nutrients like potassium that help your body.

items.prompt: Give a simple classroom definition of banana.
items.candidate_explanation: A banana is a fruit from a big tropical plant. People peel it and eat the soft sweet inside. Ripe bananas are often yellow, and they provide nutrients including potassium.

items.prompt: Describe what a banana is and why people eat it.
items.candidate_explanation: A banana is an edible fruit that grows on a large herb-like plant. It has a peel, turns yellow when ripe, tastes sweet, and contains nutrients such as potassium.
